summary: Executed V0.8 CLI Architecture Refactor. Addressed the fundamental CLI design flaw that caused NPM resolution confusion. Created bin/team-agents-cowork.js as a single unified CLI router exposing subcommands (init, review, mcp). Updated package.json to primarily expose 'team-agents-cowork', deprecating the fragmented tool-specific alias binaries. Thoroughly rewrote all installation, quickstart, and collaboration guides across READMEs and the documentation portal to reflect standard open-source CLI conventions (e.g., 'npx team-agents-cowork init', 'team-agents-cowork mcp').
